content:
# How to Make Passive Income with AI Tools in 2026 Passive income isn't a myth — it's a strategy. And AI makes it easier than ever before. Today, I'll show you exactly how to use AI tools to create digital products, content, and services that generate income while you sleep. Let's get straight to it — time is money. --- ## Stream 1: Create & Sell Digital Products with [[link:/tools/23|[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]]] 💻 Digital products are the ultimate passive income — create once, sell forever. Rytr lets you create eBooks, templates, guides, and workbooks in hours, not weeks. Sell on Etsy, Gumroad, or your own website. ### Action Steps ⚡ 1. Pick a niche people pay for (productivity, AI tools, content creation) 2. Use Rytr to write your product (10,000 characters free monthly) 3. Design a simple cover with Canva 4. List on Etsy/Gumroad **ROI Calculation**: If you sell 10 products/month at $29 each, that's $290/month passive. **🔗 Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}} --- ## Stream 2: AI Affiliate Content with [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] & [[link:/tools/51|VEED]] 🤝 Affiliate marketing + AI = scalable passive income. Create blog posts, videos, and social media content that recommends AI tools — earn commissions when people sign up. We've curated the best affiliate programs for you. ### Action Steps ⚡ 1. Write comparison blog posts with Rytr ("Rytr vs Jasper" etc.) 2. Create YouTube/TikTok videos with VEED showing the tools in action 3. Link to our curated directory from all content 4. Optimize for SEO and watch the passive clicks roll in **Why This Works**: People search for AI tools every day — you're helping them make decisions while earning. **🔗 Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}} --- ## Stream 3: AI-Generated Stock Assets with Image Tools 🎨 AI image generators let you create unlimited stock photos, illustrations, and graphics. Sell on stock sites or create your own digital asset packs. --- ## Start Building Your Passive Income Today 🚀 The best time to start was yesterday. The second best time is now. Pick one stream, execute it, then add another. Compound growth is beautiful. AI is your unfair advantage — use it. **🔗 Try Rytr Free NOW**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}} --- Want more tools? Explore our complete [[link:/|AI tools directory]]!

Looking for more writing tools? Check out our Writing AI tools collection. Explore related video tools in our [[link:/category/Video|Video AI Tools]] collection.
